articles.title: PlayStation Plus Extra/Premium Games For May 2026 Revealed
articles.title_tr: PlayStation Plus Extra/Premium Games For May 2026 Revealed
articles.summary: Sony has revealed the latest games coming to the Game Catalog for PlayStation Plus Extra and Premium subscribers in May. All of these games will be available starting May 20:Star Wars OutlawsRed Dead Redemption 2Bramble: the Mountain KingThe ThaumaturgeFlintlock: the Siege of DawnBroken Sword: Shadows of the Templar - ReforgedEnotria: The Last SongTime Crisis | PS Plus Premium requiredDon't forget, all PS Plus members can claim three freebies--EA Sports FC 26, Wuchang Fallen Feathers, and Nine Sols.--but you only have until June 1 to do so.This story is developing.

articles.title: WhatsApp Meta AI için Incognito Sohbet Özelliğini Duyurdu
articles.title_tr: WhatsApp Meta AI için Incognito Sohbet Özelliğini Duyurdu
articles.summary: Meta, WhatsApp üzerinden yapay zeka ile kurulan iletişimde gizlilik standartlarını en üst seviyeye taşıyor. Mark Zuckerberg, Meta Superintelligence Labs tarafından geliştirilen ve “Incognito Chat” (Gizli Sohbet) adını taşıyan yeni özelliği resmi olarak duyuruyor. Bu özellik sayesinde kullanıcılar, Meta AI ile yaptıkları görüşmelerin hiçbir şekilde kaydedilmediği ve Meta dahil hiç kimse tarafından erişilemediği tamamen özel bir […]

articles.title: Steelseries Aerox 3 Gen 2 Review
articles.title_tr: Steelseries Aerox 3 Gen 2 Review
articles.summary: The Aerox 3 Gen 2 upgrades an already excellent mouse with a better sensor and battery – but its "ultra-lightweight" label is stuck in the past. It's 68g despite its distinctive honeycomb design, which is heavier than modern competitors, and customization software feels years out of date.
articles.summary_tr: The Aerox 3 Gen 2 upgrades an already excellent mouse with a better sensor and battery – but its "ultra-lightweight" label is stuck in the past. It's 68g despite its distinctive honeycomb design, which is heavier than modern competitors, and customization software feels years out of date.
articles.long_summary: The Aerox 3 Gen 2 upgrades an already excellent mouse with a better sensor and battery – but its "ultra-lightweight" label is stuck in the past. It's 68g despite its distinctive honeycomb design, which is heavier than modern competitors, and customization software feels years out of date.

articles.title: Pokemon Winds and Waves’ New Video Is Packed With Adventure Vibes
articles.title_tr: Pokemon Winds and Waves’ New Video Is Packed With Adventure Vibes
articles.summary: Pokemon Winds and Waves launches next year, and to ease the wait, Nintendo and The Pokemon Company have released a new behind-the-scenes video highlighting a crucial part of the game's identity: its soundtrack.As Pokemon games have grown in scope, so too have the production standards for them, and for Pokemon Winds and Waves, a full orchestra was brought in to record the main theme. This session with the Tokyo-based NHK Symphony Orchestra was recorded, with the video below showing off just how many musicians were involved with this single piece of the new Pokemon soundtrack. Incorporating strings, woodwind, brass, and percussion instruments, the end result was a classical--but stirring--take on the traditional Pokemon theme that was used to reveal the new mainline game earlier this year.          While it starts off with a new selection of music that sets the tone for the trailer, it isn't long before the iconic Pokemon theme takes over. First composed for the original Pokemon games in 1996 by Junichi Masuda, the theme has been remixed and reinterpreted over the years, but its core sound has remained intact--much like the Star Wars or Legend of Zelda themes.Continue Reading at GameSpot

This session with the Tokyo-based NHK Symphony Orchestra was recorded, with the video below showing off just how many musicians were involved with this single piece of the new Pokemon soundtrack. Incorporating strings, woodwind, brass, and percussion instruments, the end result was a classical--but stirring--take on the traditional Pokemon theme that was used to reveal the new mainline game earlier this year. articles.title: The Boroughs Is More Spielberg Than Stranger Things Despite the Duffer Brothers’ Involvement
articles.title_tr: The Boroughs Is More Spielberg Than Stranger Things Despite the Duffer Brothers’ Involvement
articles.summary: The new series The Boroughs strives to recapture the feel-good, scary-fun qualities of 1980s Amblin-produced movies such as The Goonies and Gremlins. While a Netflix show going for Steven Spielberg vibes understandably makes one think of Stranger Things – the Duffer Brothers even serve as executive producers here – The Boroughs isn’t merely Stranger Things with old people instead of kids, as creators/showrunners Jeffrey Addiss and Will Matthews recently explained to IGN.
